overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City during golden hour. The player ascends stairs, moves through covered walkways and open streets with wet pavement reflecting neon signs, and ends at a subway entrance. The environment features futuristic architecture with a mix of natural sunlight and artificial neon lighting.

pedestrians descending stairs pass close to camera

agents.ego_description: walking up a wide stone staircase between tall buildings with red structural accents

notable_agents.action: descending the stairs while wearing casual futuristic clothing
walking down the stairs toward the camera

entered.detail: wide concrete stairs with multiple steps ascending between buildings
tall building with distinctive red vertical structural pillars
pedestrian walkway bridge connecting buildings above the stairs

segments.scene_description: The segment begins at the bottom of a wide stone staircase in an enclosed urban canyon. The camera ascends the stairs, passing pedestrians coming down. Red structural pillars line the right side of the stairwell, and an overhead pedestrian bridge is visible at the top against a bright sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with wet pavement

events.description: exits stairwell into covered walkway with reflective wet pavement
passing from shadow into area with direct sunlight filtering through

agents.ego_description: moving steadily through a covered pedestrian arcade with wet reflective floors

entered.detail: roofed pedestrian passage with polished wet pavement reflecting surroundings
illuminated vertical display screen showing colorful advertisements
modern building facade with large glass windows and geometric patterns

segments.scene_description: Having reached the top of the stairs, the scene opens into a covered pedestrian walkway with wet, reflective pavement. Digital advertising kiosks line the left side while modern glass buildings rise on the right. The space is sheltered but allows partial sky visibility, with sunlight creating dramatic reflections on the wet ground.

scene_state.functional_zone: open urban canyon with direct sunlight

events.description: strong golden hour sunlight creates lens flare and long shadows
passing through area with scattered trash and debris on ground

agents.ego_description: walking through sunlit urban canyon with tall buildings on both sides

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground near a wall

entered.detail: high-rise building with reflective glass facade catching the sunlight
large illuminated commercial signs with bright colors and text
bright golden sunlight creating lens flare effects between buildings

segments.scene_description: The environment opens into a wider urban canyon bathed in golden hour sunlight. Strong sun glare creates lens flare effects between the tall buildings. Neon billboards become visible on the right, contrasting with the natural light. The pavement remains wet and reflective, with scattered debris visible along the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial district with yellow facade building

events.description: approaching distinctive yellow building with large digital displays
turning right at corner of yellow building into narrower passage

agents.ego_description: approaching a commercial building with bright yellow facade and arcade machines

notable_agents.action: person standing near the arcade entrance

entered.detail: distinctive bright yellow commercial building with large entrance
massive illuminated billboard displaying animated advertisements
cluster of red and brown automated vending machines
storefront with glowing purple neon lights and game machines visible inside

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a distinctive yellow commercial building with large digital billboards and neon accents. Vending machines line the left side near the entrance to an arcade with purple neon lighting. The camera then turns right at the corner, moving away from the main street into a narrower passage with graffiti-covered walls.

events.description: entering narrower tree-lined alley with food stalls
passing green food vendor stalls with illuminated signage

agents.ego_description: moving through a shaded alley lined with trees and street food vendors

notable_agents.action: person walking ahead in the alleyway

entered.detail: green and red food carts with illuminated menus and umbrellas
tall leafy trees providing shade over the pedestrian path
metal roll-down doors covered in colorful graffiti tags
electrical equipment and air conditioning units on building exterior

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrower, tree-lined alley with dappled sunlight filtering through the canopy. Food vendor stalls with green and red coloring line the right side, while the left features graffiti-covered metal shutters and utility boxes. The atmosphere is more residential and shaded compared to the previous commercial street.

events.description: approaching subway entrance with stairs leading underground

agents.ego_description: approaching and entering a subway stairwell leading underground

notable_agents.action: person sitting on the ground near the subway entrance

entered.detail: wide concrete stairway entrance leading down to underground transit
tall brick building with distinctive water tower on roof visible in background
illuminated screens mounted on the subway entrance walls

segments.scene_description: The final segment approaches a subway entrance with wide concrete stairs descending underground. The lighting shifts to low artificial light as the camera nears the entrance. A water tower-topped building is visible in the background above the stairwell. Digital advertising panels line the entrance walls as the camera begins the descent into the underground station.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the depths of a narrow urban canyon into a wide, sun-drenched city street. It begins by ascending a wide stone staircase lined with red structural pillars, passing pedestrians beneath an overhead bridge that frames a bright sky. As the camera reaches the top, the scene shifts into a sheltered pedestrian walkway where digital kiosks and glass buildings flank a wet, reflective pavement. The environment then opens further into a broad urban corridor bathed in golden hour sunlight, creating strong lens flares between the towering architecture. Finally, the view expands to reveal glowing neon billboards that contrast with the natural light, while the camera glides over wet ground scattered with debris.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a vibrant commercial district into a shaded residential alley before descending into a subterranean transit hub. It begins by approaching a yellow commercial building adorned with digital billboards and purple neon arcade lights, then turns right away from the main street into a narrow passage with graffiti-covered walls. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts into a tree-lined alley where dappled sunlight filters through the canopy and colorful food vendor stalls line the path. The environment then opens up toward a subway entrance, where the natural light fades into low artificial illumination. Finally, the camera passes a building topped with a water tower and moves past digital advertising panels as it begins the descent down wide concrete stairs into the underground station.
